```{r step45}
            additional_deaths_pct * 100))
```

```{r step46}
# HELPER FUNCTION: Calibrate threshold to any external benchmark
calibrate_threshold_to_benchmark <- function(data, benchmark_year, benchmark_rate_per_1000) {
    benchmark_rate <- benchmark_rate_per_1000 / 1000
  
  # Get DHS rate for benchmark year
  dhs_rate <- data %>%
    filter(birth_year == benchmark_year) %>%
    summarise(rate = mean(b5)) %>%
    pull(rate)
  
  # Calculate missing deaths needed
  missing_needed <- benchmark_rate - dhs_rate
  
  # Get censored children in benchmark year
  censored_year <- data %>%
    filter(birth_year == benchmark_year, b5 == 0)
  
  total_children <- data %>% filter(birth_year == benchmark_year) %>% nrow()
  additional_deaths_needed <- round(total_children * missing_needed)
  pct_of_censored <- additional_deaths_needed / nrow(censored_year)
  
  # Find threshold
  if(pct_of_censored > 0 && pct_of_censored < 1) {
    threshold <- quantile(censored_year$pred_risk, probs = 1 - pct_of_censored, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    threshold <- quantile(censored_year$pred_risk, probs = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
    warning("Using default 95th percentile threshold")
  }
  
  return(list(
    threshold = threshold,
    pct_classified = pct_of_censored * 100,
    dhs_rate = dhs_rate * 1000,
    target_rate = benchmark_rate_per_1000
  ))
}

# Example usage:
# result <- calibrate_threshold_to_benchmark(under_5_current, 2019, 55)
# optimal_threshold <- result$threshold
```

```{r step47}
# STEP 7: IDENTIFY PREDICTED DEATHS AMONG CENSORED


cat("\n", paste(rep("═", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("STEP 7: IDENTIFYING PREDICTED DEATHS AMONG CENSORED\n")
cat(paste(rep("═", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

censored_children <- under_5_current %>% filter(b5 == 0)
predicted_deaths <- censored_children %>% filter(pred_death == 1)

n_predicted <- nrow(predicted_deaths)
pct_censored <- 100 * n_predicted / nrow(censored_children)

cat("\n📊 PREDICTED DEATHS AMONG CENSORED:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Censored children: %d\n", nrow(censored_children)))
cat(sprintf("  Predicted to die by age 5: %d (%.1f%% of censored)\n", 
            n_predicted, pct_censored))

# By cohort
pred_by_cohort <- censored_children %>%
  group_by(birth_cohort) %>%
  summarise(
    Censored_N = n(),
    Predicted_Deaths = sum(pred_death == 1),
    Percent_Predicted = 100 * mean(pred_death == 1),
    Mean_Risk = mean(pred_risk),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

cat("\n📊 PREDICTED DEATHS BY COHORT:\n")
print(pred_by_cohort)


```

```{r step48}
# STEP 8: CREATE ADJUSTED MORTALITY VARIABLE WITH PREDICTIONS
# (CORRECTED VERSION - No row multiplication)

cat("\n", paste(rep("═", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("STEP 8: CREATING ADJUSTED MORTALITY ESTIMATES\n")
cat(paste(rep("═", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

# Start with original filtered dataset (89,069 children, 2000-2019 only)
final_data <- cens_2000_2019

cat("\n📊 BEFORE MERGE:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Final data rows: %d\n", nrow(final_data)))
cat(sprintf("  Under-5 predictions: %d\n", nrow(under_5_current)))

# FIX: Add DISTINCT to remove duplicates in prediction data
predictions_unique <- under_5_current %>%
  # Create a unique identifier if not already present
  mutate(unique_id = paste(b7, b19, birth_year, Clu_id, sep = "_")) %>%
  # Keep only unique combinations of the merge keys
  distinct(b7, b19, birth_year, Clu_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(b7, b19, birth_year, Clu_id, pred_survival, pred_risk, pred_death, unique_id)

cat(sprintf("  Unique predictions after deduplication: %d\n", nrow(predictions_unique)))

# Check for duplicates before merging
duplicates_check <- predictions_unique %>%
  group_by(b7, b19, birth_year, Clu_id) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(n > 1)

if(nrow(duplicates_check) > 0) {
  cat("⚠️ Warning: Still found", nrow(duplicates_check), "duplicate key combinations\n")
} else {
  cat("✅ No duplicate keys - safe to merge\n")
}

# Merge predictions (NOW using distinct data)
final_data <- final_data %>%
  left_join(
    predictions_unique %>%
      select(b7, b19, birth_year, Clu_id, pred_survival, pred_risk, pred_death),
    by = c("b7", "b19", "birth_year", "Clu_id"),
    relationship = "many-to-one"  # Explicitly state expected relationship
  )

# VALIDATION: Check that rows didn't multiply
cat("\n📊 AFTER MERGE VALIDATION:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Final data rows: %d\n", nrow(final_data)))
cat(sprintf("  Original data rows: %d\n", nrow(cens_2000_2019)))

if(nrow(final_data) == nrow(cens_2000_2019)) {
  cat("✅ SUCCESS: Row count preserved (no multiplication)\n")
} else {
  cat("❌ ERROR: Row count changed from", nrow(cens_2000_2019), 
      "to", nrow(final_data), "\n")
  stop("Merge failed - check for duplicates in key variables")
}

# Check how many predictions were successfully merged
predictions_merged <- sum(!is.na(final_data$pred_survival))
cat(sprintf("  Predictions merged: %d of %d under-5 children\n", 
            predictions_merged, nrow(under_5_current)))

# Create adjusted mortality variable
final_data$b5_adjusted <- final_data$b5_original
final_data$b5_adjusted[final_data$b5_original == 0 & 
                       final_data$pred_death == 1] <- 1

# VALIDATION 8.1: Overall adjustment impact
orig_deaths <- sum(final_data$b5_original == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
adj_deaths <- sum(final_data$b5_adjusted == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
orig_rate <- 100 * mean(final_data$b5_original == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
adj_rate <- 100 * mean(final_data$b5_adjusted == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("\n📊 OVERALL ADJUSTMENT IMPACT:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Original deaths: %d (%.1f%%)\n", orig_deaths, orig_rate))
cat(sprintf("  Adjusted deaths: %d (%.1f%%)\n", adj_deaths, adj_rate))
cat(sprintf("  Additional deaths identified: %d\n", adj_deaths - orig_deaths))
cat(sprintf("  Relative increase: %.1f%%\n", 
            100 * (adj_rate - orig_rate) / orig_rate))

# VALIDATION 8.2: Adjustment by cohort
adjustment_by_cohort <- final_data %>%
  group_by(birth_cohort) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Original_Deaths = sum(b5_original == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Adjusted_Deaths = sum(b5_adjusted == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Original_Rate = 100 * mean(b5_original == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Adjusted_Rate = 100 * mean(b5_adjusted == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    Censoring_Rate = 100 * mean(b19 < 60 & b5_original == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Rate_Change = Adjusted_Rate - Original_Rate,
    Pct_Increase = 100 * (Adjusted_Rate - Original_Rate) / Original_Rate
  )

cat("\n📊 ADJUSTMENT BY BIRTH COHORT:\n")
print(adjustment_by_cohort)

# Save the corrected dataset
saveRDS(final_data, paste0(CENSOR_CENSOR_DIR, "final_data_corrected.rds"), compress = TRUE)
if(!FAST_MODE) {
  write.csv(final_data, paste0(CENSOR_CENSOR_DIR, "final_data_corrected.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\n✅ Corrected final data saved with", nrow(final_data), "rows (2000-2019 only)\n")
```

```{r step49}
# STEP 10: SAVE FINAL DATASETS
cat("\n", paste(rep("═", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("STEP 10: SAVING FINAL DATASETS\n")
cat(paste(rep("═", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")

# Save RDS (compressed binary)
saveRDS(final_data, 
        paste0(CENSOR_CENSOR_DIR, "final_data_optimized.rds"),
        compress = TRUE)

if(!FAST_MODE) {
  write.csv(final_data, 
            paste0(CENSOR_CENSOR_DIR, "final_data_optimized.csv"), 
            row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\n✅ Files saved:\n")
cat("  - final_data_optimized.rds (R binary format)\n")
if(!FAST_MODE) cat("  - final_data_optimized.csv (CSV format)\n")
cat(sprintf("\n  Final dataset: %d children\n", nrow(final_data)))
```

```{r step50}
# Calculate death counts and percentages
years <- 2000:2019
original_deaths <- c(758,814,759,775,708,588,487,531,465,422,437,260,241,219,193,163,87,69,59,13)
adjusted_deaths <- c(893,1024,940,935,974,627,645,708,617,570,514,361,367,339,340,265,147,103,78,17)
difference <- adjusted_deaths - original_deaths
pct_increase <- round((difference/original_deaths)*100, 1)

# Create summary dataframe
comparison <- data.frame(
  year = years,
  original = original_deaths,
  adjusted = adjusted_deaths,
  diff = difference,
  pct_increase = pct_increase
)
```

```{r session-info}
# Save session information for reproducibility
sink(paste0(CENSOR_CENSOR_DIR, "session_info.txt"))
cat("========================================================\n")
cat("SESSION INFORMATION\n")
cat("========================================================\n\n")
sessionInfo()
sink()

cat("\n✅ Session info saved to:", paste0(CENSOR_CENSOR_DIR, "session_info.txt"), "\n")
cat("\n========================================================\n")
cat("🎯 ANALYSIS COMPLETE - READY FOR BAYESIAN MODELING\n")
cat("========================================================\n")
```
